subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Through service to the Covenant become renowned throughout all regions, and be thou a manifestation of the hidden favours of the Abhá Beauty, the Day-Star of effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان بخدمت میثاق شهره آفاق شو و مظهر الطاف خفیه جمال ابهی نیر اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @the state of enkindlement in teaching
